title: Kanavellam Neethane Song Lyrics Dhilip Varman
stanzas: <div>Kanavellam Neethane Song Lyrics Album by Dhilip Varman

Kanavellaam neethaane
vizhiye unake uyiraanen
ninaivellaam neethaane
kalaiyaatha yugam sugamthaane

paarvai unnai alaigirathe
ullam unnai alaikkirathe
antha neram varum pozhuthu
ennai vathaikindrathe

Kanavellaam neethaane
vizhiye unake uyiraanen
ninaivellaam neethaane
kalaiyaatha yugam sugamthaane

saaral mazhai thuliyil
un ragasiyathai velipaarthen
naanam naan arindhen
konjam pani poovaai nee kuruga

enai ariyaamal manam parithaal
unai maravenadi
nijam puriyaatha nilai
adainthen edhuvarai solladi

kaalam thorum nenjil
vazhum unthan kadha
niyabagangal thinam thinam

Kanavellaam neethaane
vizhiye unake uyiraanen
ninaivellaam neethaane
kalaiyaatha yugam sugamthaane

Thaedal varum pozhuthu
en unarvugalum kalanguthadi
kaanalaai kidanthen
naan un varamaai
vizhi thiranthen

inai piriyaatha nilaiprave
nenjil yaagame
thavithidum podhu
aaruthalaai unmadi saaigiren.

kaalam thorum nenjil
vazhum unthan kadha
niyabagangal thinam thinam

Kanavellaam neethaane
vizhiye unake uyiraanen
ninaivellaam neethaane
kalaiyaatha yugam sugamthaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanavellam Neethane?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a lover's dreams and memories.

Who is the singer of Kanavellam Neethane?

The song is sung by Dhilip Varman, known for his soulful voice and romantic melodies.

When was Kanavellam Neethane released?

The song was released on February 25, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kanavellam Neethane is a beautiful expression of love and longing, sung by Dhilip Varman. It captures the essence of romantic dreams and cherished memories, evoking a sense of nostalgia and deep emotion. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. This song is ideal for those special occasions when love is in the air.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kanavellam Neethane, a soulful rendition by Dhilip Varman. This song captures the essence of love and longing with its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics. Dive into the world of romance and let the music take you on an emotional journey.
stanzaMeanings: In all my dreams, it's you. I live for you. All my thoughts are about you. This endless time is happiness.
Your gaze captures me, my heart is restless for you. When that moment comes, it torments me.
In all my dreams, it's you. I live for you. All my thoughts are about you. This endless time is happiness.
In the drizzle, I saw your secret. I understood your shyness. You, like a little dew flower, come closer.
Without knowing me, if your heart is troubled, I won't forget you. I reached a state where I couldn't understand the truth. Tell me how far.
Every moment, your story lives in my heart, memories of you every day.
In all my dreams, it's you. I live for you. All my thoughts are about you. This endless time is happiness.
When searching, my feelings get confused. I lay like a mirage, opened my eyes as your blessing.
When the heart suffers without separation, I find comfort resting on your lap.
Every moment, your story lives in my heart, memories of you every day.
In all my dreams, it's you. I live for you. All my thoughts are about you. This endless time is happiness.
